home.title: Agents Orchestrator
home.lead: Artificial intelligence portal by Tech and Solve — each module is an agentic orchestration designed, specified and implemented with AI using our development methodology.
home.methodDesc: This portal was built by refining the methodology while implementing it. Steps marked as pending were not yet applied in this version.
home.methodNote: This portal was built iterating on the method: team refinement, AI-generated specs, and phased implementation with Claude Code. QA review and the formal testing cycle will be incorporated in the next phase. See How we work for the full framework with sprints and client deliveries.
home.modulesDesc: Each module is an independent agentic orchestration — a specialized AI flow that solves a specific business problem.
home.footerText: Built by Tech and Solve with the Design Docs + Context Engineering methodology — where AI doesn't guess, it executes with context.
home.sprintReviewDesc: The client validates the increment, provides feedback, and the next sprint is planned.
home.qaAgentDesc: We have an AI agent that generates test cases from the approved spec, speeding up repetitive tasks in certification. This ensures the development speed gained with AI is maintained throughout the entire cycle.

steps.refinementDesc: Team + client align on the need
steps.qaReviewDesc: QA validates scope and edge cases

modules.accountPlanningDesc: Intelligent client profiling with web search, deep analysis, and commercial portfolio generation.
modules.pmAgentDesc: Project management assistant that organizes tasks, prioritizes, and tracks team progress.
modules.proposalsDesc: Collaborative generation and review of commercial proposals with multi-role approval flow.
modules.knowledgeDesc: Organizational knowledge base powered by documents, with semantic search.
modules.methodologyDesc: Interactive guide to the Design Docs + Context Engineering methodology for AI development.

hero.title: How we work
hero.lead: We build applied-AI business solutions with short iterations, living documentation and permanent co-construction with the client.

principles.title: Principles that guide our work
principles.desc: Ideas that shape every technical decision and every conversation with the client.
principles.iterationsDesc: Each cycle produces something the client can see, use and validate. No long analysis phases without deliverables.
principles.docsDesc: Specs, decisions and contracts are versioned alongside the code and updated in the same workflow.
principles.coDesc: The client doesn't just receive deliverables at the end: they join every refinement session, validate at every demo and set priorities sprint by sprint.

inception.title: Inception — the first sessions with the client
inception.desc: Before writing a single line of code, we work alongside the client to understand the full problem and build the foundation every iteration will run on.
inception.understandDesc: Stakeholder sessions to uncover the real pain, not the solution already imagined.
inception.scopeDesc: Epics, modules, integrations, and what stays out of the MVP.
inception.archDesc: Technical decisions hard to reverse later: data, AI, integrations.
inception.storiesDesc: Prioritized initial backlog that feeds the first iterations.
inception.roadmapDesc: Iteration sequence with visible milestones for the client.
inception.out5: Definition of Ready and Definition of Done

phases.title: Four phases per iteration
phases.desc: With the Inception foundation set, each iteration follows this short predictable cycle.
phases.refineDesc: We take the prioritized stories and prepare them with the client: acceptance criteria, clear scope and dependencies.
phases.refineOutput: Stories ready for development (Definition of Ready).
phases.designDesc: We define the technical solution: API contracts, data model, integration with existing systems.
phases.designOutput: Module spec, ADRs and updated contracts.
phases.buildDesc: We implement on the architecture defined for the project's needs, with structured code and automated tests.
phases.buildOutput: Code deployed to the test environment.
phases.validateDesc: Live demo with the client, feedback capture and next-iteration planning.

hu.title: A User Story's journey
hu.desc: Every story walks this path and leaves documented traces at each step.
hu.inceptionDetail: The need is identified and the initial story is written with business context.
hu.backlogDetail: The story enters the prioritized backlog, visible to the entire team.
hu.refinementDetail: Acceptance criteria, scope and dependencies are detailed with the team.
hu.sprintDetail: It is implemented, flows are tested and deployed to the test environment.
hu.demoDetail: It is presented to the client at the iteration demo and feedback is collected.
hu.acceptanceDetail: The client validates it meets the agreed criteria and it is marked as complete.

iter.title: What we deliver in each iteration
iter.desc: Concrete documentation versioned in the project repository.
iter.specPurpose: What it does, how to use it, business rules
iter.specWhen: On every new feature or change
iter.adrPurpose: Why a technical decision was made
iter.adrWhen: When an architectural change is decided
iter.userPurpose: How the end user operates it
iter.demoPurpose: What was shown, feedback, next steps

final.title: Final package at project close
final.desc: Consolidated manuals so the client can operate the solution autonomously.
final.techContent: Full architecture, deployment, configuration and troubleshooting
final.userContent: All system flows with screenshots and examples
final.opsContent: Monitoring, backups, incident management and contacts
final.promptContent: AI prompts used, versions and expected outputs

cer.title: Ceremonies with the client and team
cer.desc: A predictable conversation rhythm so nobody loses context.
cer.refinePurpose: Prepare stories for the next sprint
cer.demoPurpose: Show what was built and collect feedback

quality.title: Quality guarantees
quality.desc: Practices we apply from day one of the project.
quality.ai: Documented decisions: every architectural change is captured as an ADR
quality.review: Mandatory code review before every deploy
quality.envs: Separate environments: dev, test and production
quality.versioning: Semantic versioning of APIs and contracts
quality.logs: Logs and observability from day one

end.title: When we consider the project delivered
end.desc: Project end is not a date, it is a set of fulfilled conditions.
end.cardTitle: The project is considered delivered when:
end.item1: All in-scope modules are deployed to the agreed environment and validated by the client
end.item2: Knowledge transfer to the client team is complete
end.item3: The final package of manuals is delivered
end.item4: A closing minute is signed with a defined warranty and support period

diff.title: What makes our way of working different
diff.desc: Not textbook methodology: practices honed delivering real solutions.
diff.docsDesc: They live next to the code and are updated in the same workflow.
diff.decisionsDesc: ADRs keep critical decisions from getting lost in email or chat.
diff.aiTitle: The client decides, not just receives
diff.aiDesc: Every priority, scope and adjustment is agreed in joint sessions, not in documents that arrive already signed.
diff.valueDesc: No long analysis phases without visible deliverables.
diff.clientDesc: The demo is not a report: it is the product running.
diff.iaDesc: We use AI to speed up analysis, documentation and development. Smaller teams, faster delivery, without sacrificing quality.

footer.tagline: Applied AI for business, with method.
